name: Navigation

semanticTypeCandidates.evidence: Left vertical menu with icon+label items and active state
Horizontal top bar with breadcrumb and actions
Horizontal tabs for content section switching

representativeVariants.name: Sidebar Navigation
representativeVariants.whySelected: Core layout element — left vertical menu with orange active state
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Menu items (vertical list, each with icon 20px + label): 仪表盘 (active state: color var(--color-primary), background var(--color-primary) at 10% alpha, left 3px orange border), 数据分析, 用户管理, 系统设置. Bottom: user avatar + name.

representativeVariants.name: Top Navigation Bar
representativeVariants.whySelected: Horizontal bar above content — breadcrumb + search + actions
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Left: breadcrumb '仪表盘 / 数据分析' (muted-foreground for parent, foreground for current); Center: search input (sm); Right: ghost button '导出报告' + avatar circle

representativeVariants.name: Tab Navigation
representativeVariants.whySelected: Horizontal tabs for content section switching — orange underline active state
representativeVariants.childrenDigest: Tab items (horizontal row, each padding var(--space-3) var(--space-4)): 概览 (active: color var(--color-primary), border-bottom 2px solid var(--color-primary)), 明细, 趋势, 设置

anatomy.description: Vertical menu, 220px wide, icon+label items, active item has orange accent
Horizontal bar, 56px tall, breadcrumb + search + actions
Horizontal tab strip with orange underline on active tab

structurePatterns: Sidebar: flex column, fixed width, each item flex row with gap var(--space-3)
Topbar: flex row, justify between, align center
Tabs: flex row, gap var(--space-1), each tab inline-flex column with label + border-bottom indicator

bestPractices: Sidebar + topbar form the standard dashboard shell layout
Only one active item at a time in sidebar
Tabs for switching views within a page, not for navigation
Active state always uses warm orange accent

doNotInvent: Mega menu or dropdown navigation (not in spec)
unknowns: Sidebar collapse behavior — render expanded only
keyInsightSeed: Left sidebar + top bar modular layout, orange active states
